oracle.type: standalone single-column Fortran drivers linked against the UNMODIFIED pristine WRF module_sf_{slab,sfclay,gfs}.F (NOT a JAX self-compare); fp64 (-fdefault-real-8 -fdefault-double-8).

gfs_sfclay.operational_status: IMPLEMENTED -- scan-wired via coupling.scan_adapters.gfs_sfclay_adapter (SFCLAY_SCAN_ADAPTERS[3]); writes the B2 kinematic surface flux handles. fpvs reproduced faithfully (the same 7501-node Clausius-Clapeyron table).

old_mm5_sfclay.operational_status: IMPLEMENTED -- scan-wired via coupling.scan_adapters.sfclay_old_mm5_adapter (SFCLAY_SCAN_ADAPTERS[91]); writes the B2 kinematic surface flux handles.

slab_lsm.operational_status: REFERENCE_ONLY -- fp64 oracle-validated, but fail-closed in the operational scan until the slab LSM hook (TSLB land carry + GSW/GLW forcing + TMN/THC/EMISS statics) is threaded; selectable for a single-column reference comparison.
